prompt: Create a transparent-background 2D battle VFX asset for Pokemon-style dragon attacks. Show only the effect element, with no character, arena, text, UI, watermark, or frame. Use a compact draconic burst with a cobalt-violet core, ember-gold rim light, angular scale shards, and tight impact fragments. Make the subject lingering dragon residue: low-alpha smoke, faint ember motes, and broken scale fragments after the hit. Keep it subtle enough to layer behind the bloom without obscuring it. Output a single isolated effect element on transparency.
negative_prompt: no background, no arena, no Pokemon body, no trainer, no text, no watermark, no UI, no frame, no checkerboard, no fake transparency pattern, no giant beam, no long travel trail, no fog wall, no elemental fireball
